title: VKSU Admit Card 2024‑28 Semester 4 Out

detail.title: VKSU Admit Card 2024‑28 Semester 4 Out
detail.short_info: VKSU Admit Card 2024‑28 UG Semester 4 released for BA, BSc, BCom at vksuexams.com. Download VKSU UG 4th semester hall ticket using registration number and DOB and check exam dates, exam centre details and exam‑day instructions here.

content.text: Vidyasagar University (VKSU) Semesters 4 Admit Card 2024‑28 has been released for undergraduate (UG) students on the official exam portal vksuexams.com. Students enrolled in the 2024‑28 batch who are appearing for Semester‑4 examinations must download and carry their admit card to the examination hall on the scheduled date.
The VKSU Semester 4 admit card serves as the primary identification document for entry into the exam centre and is mandatory for every UG student appearing for the semester exams.
Direct Link to Download VKSU Admit Card 2024‑28

links.text: Direct Link to Download VKSU Admit Card 2024‑28

headers: Veer Kunwar Singh University (VKSU), Ara, Bihar
rows: NEP Semester-IV Session (2024–2028) admit card live now
Course Selection, Registration Number and Date of Birth (dd/mm/yyyy)

sections.heading: How to Download VKSU Admit Card 2024‑28 Semester 4

content.text: Follow these steps to download your VKSU Semester‑4 admit card:

items: Go to the VKSU exam portal: https://vksuexams.com/admitcard.aspx
Select the relevant option: “2024‑28” session and “Semester‑4” from the dropdown.
Enter your Registration Number / Roll Number and DOB (or other required credentials) as asked.
Click “Submit” or “Download Admit Card”.
The VKSU Admit Card 2024‑28 (Semester‑4) will be displayed on the screen.
Verify all details carefully.
Download the admit card PDF and take at least two clear printouts to carry on exam day.

content.text: Students are advised to download the admit card as early as possible to avoid last‑minute technical issues.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on VKSU Semester 4 Admit Card 2024‑28

content.text: The VKSU Semester‑4 admit card includes the following information:

items: Student’s full name and parents’ name
Roll number / Registration number and session (2024‑28)
Course and semester (e.g., BA Semester‑4, BSc Semester‑4, etc.)
Exam date and session (morning/afternoon)
Exam centre name and full address
Subject list for Semester‑4
Instructions for candidates and hall‑ticket‑related guidelines

content.text: If any detail is incorrect (name spelling, course, exam centre, or date), students must immediately contact the VKSU Examination / Examination Cell through the official helpline or email provided on the website.

sections.heading: Documents Required with VKSU Admit Card 2024‑28

content.text: On the exam day, students must carry:

items: A printed copy of the VKSU Admit Card 2024‑28 (Semester‑4)
One original valid photo ID proof such as: Aadhaar Card PAN Card Passport Voter ID Driving Licence
Aadhaar Card
PAN Card
Passport
Voter ID
Driving Licence
Any other document if specifically mentioned in the admit card or official notification

content.text: Students without a valid admit card and acceptable ID proof will not be allowed to appear for the examinations.
To ensure smooth conduct of the VKSU Semester‑4 exams, students are advised to follow these exam‑day instructions:

items: Reach the exam centre at least 30-40 minutes before the reporting time mentioned on the admit card.
Carry only essential items: admit card, ID proof, and permitted stationery (blue/black ball‑point pen, etc.).
Do not carry mobile phones, smart watches, calculators, Bluetooth devices, or any electronic gadgets inside the exam hall.
Follow the instructions of the invigilators and maintain discipline throughout the examination.
Do not carry bulky bags or unnecessary items; follow the centre‑specific rules for baggage.
Keep the VKSU admit card safe even after the exam, as it may be required for result verification and future semesters.

VKSU Sem 4 exam date 29 April to 5 May
